title: GitHub Review by gndrmnn

code_comments.author: gndrmnn
code_comments.resolution: Deleted cardinality_test.go and re-added the equivalent TestSubReconcilerMetricsHaveNoCRLabels (plus its newCollectorsForTest helper) in operators/keystone/internal/metrics/collectors_test.go.

code_comments.body: If this constructor is test-only, move it to the test file `collectors_test.go`
code_comments.author: gndrmnn
code_comments.resolution: Removed newCollectorsForTest from collectors.go (lines ~96-108) and moved it into collectors_test.go; inlined its body into NewTestRecorder so collectors.go no longer carries a test-only constructor.

code_comments.body: If your internal methods are solely used in tests, move their definition to the test file `collectors_test.go`.
code_comments.author: gndrmnn
code_comments.resolution: Kept the internal *collectors methods in collectors.go because they are invoked by the public package-level helpers (ObserveReconcileDuration, RecordReconcileError, SetKeyRotationAge, RecordDBSync, DeleteForKeystone), and rewrote the section comment to make clear they are production code that tests also exercise directly, not test-only code.

code_comments.body: No, we are not going to unit test documentation against code. Remove `contract_test.go`
code_comments.author: gndrmnn

code_comments.body: We are *absolutely* not going to test source code via literal string analysis. This is not acceptable remove lines 262-432
code_comments.author: gndrmnn
code_comments.resolution: Removed the AST-based TestSubReconcilerConditionTypesCoversAllCallSites test and its helpers (collectSubReconcilerCallSiteNames, isIdent, isParallelSubFanOut, stringLiteral) from instrumentation_test.go along with the associated go/ast, go/parser, go/token, path/filepath, sort, strconv, and strings imports — 180 lines deleted from the file.

resolution_summary: All five review comments were addressed by deleting and relocating test code. The cardinality test was merged into collectors_test.go (as TestSubReconcilerMetricsHaveNoCRLabels), the test-only newCollectorsForTest constructor was moved out of collectors.go into collectors_test.go, contract_test.go was deleted entirely, and the AST-based literal-analysis drift guard (plus its helpers and go/ast/parser/token imports) was removed from instrumentation_test.go. For comment [2], the internal methods on *collectors were kept in collectors.go because they are not test-only — each public package-level helper (ObserveReconcileDuration, RecordReconcileError, etc.) forwards to them — and the surrounding comment was rewritten to document this; the supporting code-comment in collectors.go was also updated to drop the stale reference to newCollectorsForTest.
